zh.lifeSummary: 當Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens於1201年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼時，他的父親Enguerrand de Picquigny II30歲，母親Marguerite de Ponthieu28歲。他於大約1225年與Laure de Montfort結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年5月在巴勒斯坦享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gérard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens was born in 1201, in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, was 30 and his mother, Marguerite de Ponthieu, was 28. He married Laure de Montfort about 1225. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in May 1248, in Palestine, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens est né en 1201, à Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Ponthieu, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Laure de Montfort environ 1225. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1248, à Palestine, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens 1201 in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand de Picquigny II 30 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Ponthieu 28. Er hat um 1225 Laure de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1248 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens è nato il nel 1201 nel Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Ponthieu, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Laure de Montfort circa 1225. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1248, nel Palestina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiensが1201年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Picquigny IIは30歳，母Marguerite de Ponthieuは28歳であった。約1225年にLaure de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1248年5月にパレスチナで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens(이)가 1201년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand de Picquigny II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Ponthieu(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1225년 Laure de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 5월 팔레스타인에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens nasceu em 1201, em Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Ponthieu, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Laure de Montfort aproximadamente 1225. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1248, em Palestina, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens родился в 1201 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Enguerrand de Picquigny II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Ponthieu, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Laure de Montfort около 1225 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер май 1248 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gérard II de Picquigny, Vct of Amiens nació en 1201, en Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Ponthieu, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Laure de Montfort aproximadamente 1225. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1248, en Palestina, a la edad de 47 años.
